author: alpppine
description: Open notes in reader mode and click anywhere to switch to edit mode with the cursor placed at the end of the note. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Click to Edit

name: Click to Edit

releases.author: alpppine
releases.description: Add 'Disable on mobile' setting (default on). Suppresses both auto-switch to reader mode and click-to-edit on mobile devices, so mobile users get native Obsidian behavior out of the box.

releases.author: alpppine
releases.description: Click-to-edit cursor positioning fix: clicking in reader mode now drops the cursor near the click point instead of jumping to the end of the note.

releases.author: alpppine
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Open notes in reading view automatically when they have content.
- Click anywhere in a rendered note to switch to editing view, with the cursor placed at the end of the note.
- Configurable cursor placement: end of note (default), top of note, or near where you clicked.
- Skip-empty-notes option so brand-new notes still open in editing view.
